title: Piss tank telemetry borken?! [title edited by you-know-who]
author: tom-lejeune
body: Are you still getting the urine tank telemetry from the iss?   is it a general issue or just me who can't get it to work?  how much is in the tank according to your app?

title: Android port?
author: DVD-DAVIDE
body: Are there any plans for a port to Android (or any other non-Apple platform, mobile or otherwise)?

title: Feature Request: Home assistant integration.
author: anilcanpolat
body: Wouldnt it be super cool to have an easy overview of dear astranauts urination status inside our home, so that i can sleep well knowing our friends are not drowning in peepee.

title: Piss levels over time chart
author: CoffMakesThings
body:
Hi,

Can you please implement a chart that shows the urine tank capacity over time?

Thank you.

title: Feature Suggestions
author: szcharlesji
body:
Here are some useful features I can think of to make UX Better:
- Dynamic Island
- Live Activity Widget
- Siri Shortcut Integration
- SharePlay Pee Party: Co-watch a live stream with friends via FaceTime/SharePlay
- CarPlay Dashboard

title: I can publish this on the App Store for you
author: NickBouwhuis
body:
If you want I can publish the app via my App Store account. I already have a developer subscription for my Hauk iOS client. 

Let me know!

title: Windows version 404 not found
author: nezhadian
body: hello, i see your project it's very useful please develop windows version either.

title: Unnecessary subscription to TIME_000001 causes "excessive" network traffic (1 KB/s or 590MB/week)
author: varenc

title: New PDFs are still identified as duplicates
author: eboehnisch
body: Maybe the `contentHash` is set with not-yet-ready text?

title: Sign the release package? 🙏
author: varenc
body:
Gentle request that the developer sign and notarize the release. 

Don't want onerous MDM policies preventing users from running this critical piece of software! Signing is also a requirement to be a registered homebrew cask, so I can just add `brew install --cask pissstream` to my new laptop provisioning script.

Also feel 100% free to close this issue with or without prejudice.

title: Update README.md 💣
author: durul
body: Please update README.md files with iPhone Vision Pro images and details.😎

title: Add option to reduce query frequency
author: slater
body: Right now, it's checking lightstreamer.com every second, and downloading a 1KB payload. Maybe have it query less often, or a preference to update manually, once an hour, etc.?

title: Name change proposal
author: daschy
body:
For the sake of naming convention with other selfhosted services. I propose to change the name to urinarr or another name that ends with arr


Merry Xmas

title: Pisstory
author: bcardarella
body: Would be funny for a tracked history on the deltas on the urine tank so I can see the time and +/- % to the tank

title: please add touchbar support
author: lawrence0arabia
body: this app is delightfully useless. one way it could become even more useless is if it supported the touchbar. i just think this would be pretty cool. thank you.
